title: C-22 fragmentation grenade

The [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] '''C-22 fragmentation grenade''' was a [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] which consisted of a small [[Detonite/Legends|detonite]] charge encased in a pre-stressed [[chrome]] shell. Upon detonation, the grenade filled an area of ten [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in diameter with shrapnel.<ref name="EGWT" />

Twisting the timer dial up on the top of the grenade set a time delay for up to two [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], while pressing the activation panel on the rim of the grenade primed the detonite charge and started the timer. Holding this panel down stopped the timer, and an access code deactivated the primer.<ref name="EGWT" />

The C-22 could either be thrown or, by means of a magnetic grapple on the underside of the grenade, be precisely placed for demolition work. In this form it could also be used as a [[Mine/Legends|mine]].<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>
